links.source_location: Shorts Queue: queue snapshots of saved entries

attributes.technique: SVG feGaussianBlur filters on masked ellipses to create neon glow effect inside bolt shape

links.description: Isometric illustration of two stacked rounded rectangle layers — the top layer is an outline/ghost shape (transparent/white) and the bottom layer is filled with a purple/violet gradient with light reflections. Suggests a layered or data-stacking concept, consistent with a local-first app hero/branding graphic.
